Thanks for contributing! A few things to keep in mind:

- The PR title must follow Conventional Commits (`feat: ...`, `fix: ...`,
  `docs: ...`, `chore: ...`). The title becomes part of the auto-generated
  changelog at release time.
- Keep PRs focused. Smaller PRs get reviewed faster.
- Run `pnpm lint` and `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` before pushing.
-->
